title: Enforce Studio Dev Runner Topology
forbids: root dev aliases, package daemon watcher scripts, dev target topology drift, retired devLive daemon files, Bun watch restarting the Studio daemon during runtime writes, a resolved development-serve host other than 127.0.0.1, a missing or non-exact bare @civ7/studio-contract source alias in resolved development-serve alias configuration, any alias matching the bare @civ7/studio-contract import in resolved production-build alias configuration, or required generated/deploy paths absent from Vite watch ignores
why: Studio development-serve topology is structural task authority. The exact bare source alias and absence of a bare-matching production-build alias support the design goal that production builds use package artifacts; this check enforces only those resolved alias invariants, not export-map or package resolution.
remediate: Keep Studio development-serve orchestration in Nx project targets, run the dev daemon with the dev-only bun-source condition without Bun watch, configure the resolved Vite host as 127.0.0.1, provide the exact bare @civ7/studio-contract source alias in resolved development-serve aliases, remove aliases matching that bare import from resolved production-build aliases, and include every required generated/deploy path in Vite watch ignores.
message: MapGen Studio dev runner topology drifted.
